extensionName.description: Extension name shown by the browser.

extensionDescription.message: Clip web pages to your Memos instance.
extensionDescription.description: Extension description shown by the browser.

optionsLanguageSaveError.message: The language preference couldn't be saved. Please try again.

popupEmptyCapturePlaceholder.message: Nothing could be captured from this page — write your memo here

popupFailedImages_one.description: Shown after saving when exactly one image upload failed.

popupFailedImages_other.description: Shown after saving when multiple image uploads failed.

popupSelectionImages_one.message: $COUNT$ image from your selection will be attached
popupSelectionImages_one.description: Explains that one selected image will be attached.

popupSelectionImages_other.message: $COUNT$ images from your selection will be attached
popupSelectionImages_other.description: Explains that multiple selected images will be attached.

popupDraftPreserved.message: Your draft is preserved, but it can’t be saved until the connection is ready.

popupCaptureRestricted.message: Only the page link was captured — the browser blocks page access here.

popupCaptureTimedOut.message: Only the page link was captured — page capture timed out.

popupCaptureNoDescriptionSelection.message: The selection and page link were captured — no readable description was found.

popupCaptureNoDescription.message: Only the page link was captured — no readable description was found.

popupCaptureContentUnavailable.message: Only the page link was captured — page content was unavailable.

popupCaptureFailed.message: This page could not be captured. You can write the memo manually.

popupChooseConnection.message: Choose how to connect the clipper to your Memos instance.

popupConnectToStart.message: Connect your Memos instance to start clipping.

popupUnsupportedWithVersion.description: Unsupported-version explanation when the installed Memos version is known.

why.example: This clipper needs a newer version.

popupUnsupportedWithoutVersion.description: Unsupported-version explanation when the installed Memos version is unavailable.

why.example: This clipper needs a newer version.

optionsTemplateLocked.message: Connect a supported Memos instance first; then you can configure how clips are formatted.

optionsTemplateDescription.message: Customize how every clip is formatted before it reaches Memos. This setting is saved only in this browser.

optionsAccountConnectionDescription.message: Save your connection to your account and use it after signing in on other devices.

optionsDirectDescription.message: Connect this browser with an instance URL and personal access token. No usememos.com account is required.

optionsDirectSetupDescription.message: Enter the address of your Memos instance and a personal access token.

optionsCreateToken.message: Create a token in Memos settings

optionsEnterUrlForTokenSettings.message: Enter the instance URL to open token settings

optionsTokenAdvice.message: Use a dedicated token named “Web Clipper” and prefer an expiration date.

optionsInvalidUrlField.message: Enter a complete http:// or https:// Memos address.

optionsUnencryptedBody.message: Your access token and future clips will travel over HTTP. Use HTTPS unless this is a network you trust.

optionsUseMemosSetupDescription.message: Your account keeps the connection information available when you sign in on another device.

optionsSavedConnectionIncomplete.message: The saved connection is incomplete. Repair it on usememos.com.

optionsNoConnectionFound.message: No connection was found for this account. Make sure usememos.com uses the same account.

optionsRepairDestination.message: Connect or repair your destination on usememos.com, then return here to check it.

optionsRefreshConnectionError.message: Couldn't refresh your usememos.com connection. Check your connection and try again.

optionsSignInError.message: Sign-in was cancelled or couldn't be completed. You can try again.

optionsCurrentConnectionActive.message: Your current connection remains active until this one is verified.

optionsConnectedAs.description: Connection status followed by the Memos display name.

optionsTokenSaved.message: Access token saved in this browser.

optionsDisconnectConfirm.message: Disconnect this browser from Memos? This does not revoke a direct token on the Memos server.

optionsConnectedToHost.description: Connection status followed by the destination host name.

optionsConnectionSummary.message: Choose one source for the instance URL and access token.

templateEmptyPreview.message: Nothing to preview — the template is empty.

templateSaveError.message: The template wasn't saved. Your draft is still here—try again.

templateHelp.message: Every clip is composed through this template before it reaches the editor. Plain text—including #tags—is kept as written.

templateExample.description: Labels an example value for a clip-template placeholder.

templatePreviewContent.message: > The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

templatePreviewDescription.message: A short summary of the page.

templateDescriptionMeaning.description: Explains the maximum length of the captured page summary.

templateDescriptionSource.message: Open Graph → meta description → first readable paragraph

templateTitleMeaning.message: Page title, or URL as fallback

templatePreviewSection.message: Preview — how it lands in Memos

templateExternalUpdate.message: A different settings page saved another template. Your unsaved draft is still here.

templateReadError.message: The saved template couldn't be read. The default is shown for now.

templateStorageError.message: The template couldn't be saved to this browser. Please try again.

authRefreshError.message: The extension couldn't refresh your usememos.com account.

authSignOutError.message: The extension couldn't sign you out. Please try again.

contextFailureWithFix.description: Combines an error title and its first recovery step in a compact toast.

contextSavePartial_one.message: Saved to Memos — $COUNT$ image couldn't be uploaded
contextSavePartial_one.description: Context-menu result when the memo saved but one image failed.

contextSavePartial_other.message: Saved to Memos — $COUNT$ images couldn't be uploaded
contextSavePartial_other.description: Context-menu result when the memo saved but multiple images failed.

errorInvalidUrlWhy.message: The destination must be a complete http:// or https:// address without embedded credentials, a query, or a fragment.

errorInvalidUrlFix.message: Enter the address you use to open Memos, such as https://memos.example.com.

errorExtensionWhy.message: The popup couldn't reach its background service worker, so the save result is unknown.

errorExtensionFix.message: Keep this popup open and try again; your draft is still here.

errorStorageWhy.message: The connection was verified, but the browser couldn't store it on this device.

errorStorageFix.message: Check that extension storage is available, then try again.

errorAuthChangedWhy.message: The signed-in account or Memos destination changed after this popup opened.

errorAuthChangedFix.message: Review the current account, then try saving again.

errorAuthUnavailableWhy.message: The extension couldn't reach usememos.com, so it did not use cached credentials for this write.

errorAuthUnavailableFix.message: Check your connection and try again.

errorNotConfiguredWhy.message: You haven't connected a Memos instance to the clipper yet.

errorNotConfiguredFix.message: Open the extension settings, choose a connection method, then connect your instance.

errorMixedContentWhy.message: The extension will send your Memos access token and clip content over http:// without TLS encryption.

errorMixedContentFixHttps.message: Serve your Memos instance over https.

errorMixedContentFixLocal.message: Use http:// only for a local development instance such as localhost.

errorCorsWhy.message: The server is reachable but didn't allow the extension to read the response.

errorCorsFixOnline.message: Confirm the instance is online and reachable.

errorCorsFixUrl.message: Check the instance URL and try the connection again.

errorUnreachableWhy.message: The request never got a response from the server.

errorUnreachableFixOpen.message: Open the instance URL in a tab to confirm it loads.

errorUnauthorizedWhy.message: The instance returned 401/403 — the token is invalid or expired.

errorUnauthorizedDirectFixReplace.message: Replace the token in extension settings.

errorUnauthorizedDirectFixCreate.message: If needed, create a new token in your Memos user settings.

errorUnauthorizedAccountFixReconnect.message: Sign in to usememos.com and reconnect.

errorUnauthorizedAccountFixRegenerate.message: If it persists, regenerate your access token in Memos settings.

errorTimeoutWhy.message: The server didn't respond in time.

errorTimeoutFixOnline.message: Check the server is online and not overloaded.

errorUnsupportedWhy.message: This clipper needs Memos $VERSION$ or a newer stable 0.x release to match the API it uses.
errorUnsupportedWhy.description: Explains the minimum supported Memos version.

errorUnsupportedFix.message: Update your Memos instance to $VERSION$ or a newer stable 0.x release, then reconnect.
errorUnsupportedFix.description: Recovery instruction containing the minimum supported Memos version.

errorBadResponseWhy.message: The instance returned something that isn't a valid API response.

errorBadResponseFixApi.message: Confirm the URL points at your Memos API.

errorBadResponseFixRedirect.message: If your server redirects, use the final URL.
